page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor running at 2.9 GHz. The instance features 16 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, providing 16 dedicated vCPUs without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 7679 GB of bundled local SSD storage, offering high-capacity local data retention directly on the host. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps. The virtualization layer is managed via the KVM hypervisor. No graphics processing units are included in this hardware profile.

The dedicated CPU allocation and lack of hyperthreading ensure consistent, predictable compute performance free from resource contention. The high ratio of local SSD storage to memory makes this instance highly resource-dense for data-intensive operations, reducing the need for external block storage attachments. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads such as localized databases, high-throughput storage systems, and memory-intensive data processing tasks that require fast local read and write access.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.4xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring a dedicated Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor with 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs at 2.9 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it ensures dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The hardware profile includes 128.0 GB of system memory and 7679 GB of bundled local SSD storage, alongside a 40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Lacking a GPU, this instance is designed for high-density storage and memory-intensive workloads. The combination of dedicated cores, high memory-to-vCPU ratio, and massive local SSD capacity makes it highly efficient for localized databases, storage-heavy applications, and data processing tasks requiring consistent performance and fast local I/O.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.4xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, 7679 GB of local SSD storage, and 40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for data-intensive workloads.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon instance featuring massive bundled local SSD storage and high memory density for data-intensive workloads.
